description: Korean OSAT company specializing in display driver IC (DDI) and mobile semiconductor packaging and testing. Global OSAT rank ~18. High exposure to DDI and mobile segments makes it sensitive to demand volatility. Expanding into PMIC, CIS, SoC, and AI/high-performance semiconductor packaging. Targets top 10 global OSAT ranking and 1T KRW revenue. Plans to increase overseas sales from 10% to 40%.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - wafer probing and dicing equipment for OSAT backend
_externalRelationships.notes: Market cap: 299.1B KRW. FY2025 revenue: ~479.8B KRW, operating loss: -39.8B KRW. High DDI exposure caused profitability challenges. 2025 Q3 cumulative revenue +3.7% YoY but operating losses widened 62.3%. Foreign ownership relatively high at 31.84%. As an OSAT performing wafer probing and dicing, LB Semicon is a likely Accretech customer.
